definition: ngram4's path-tuple granularity turns each step of a sequential multi-step decode/check sequence into a distinct new bucket, retaining near-miss inputs that progressively advance through the linear cascade and that single-edge feedback collapses and discards

ngram4 rewards each sibling sub-path in a content-dispatch false-branch fan-out as a distinct 4-edge path tuple, retaining diverse non-dominant-arm seeds that single-edge feedback under-retains, sustaining corpus pressure off the dominant true arm
